The crappiest of all Transformers. Thats what happens when you keep making the same movie again and again and not left with any original story. This movie has stolen ideas from, Fantastic Four (silver surfer), Avengers End Game, Fast and Furious and a few other Marvel Avenger movies. Even added a Gorilla and gave hints of King Kong. A mishmash of nothing basically.
What did they steal from them
Absolutely no evidence to support any of those claims

They only took from the Transformers lore; Unicron was first seen in 1986, Beast wars with Optimus Primal and the other Maximals was a series in the 90's. And the Transformers was like they were back in G1.

Why do you keep making the same mistakes of the past by focusing on the humans. The tidal of the fricking film is "TRANSFORMERS" NOT HUMANS!!! We don't come to watch humans and all the DRAMA; (we see those every day) we come to watch "TRANSFORMERS". We don't want DRAMA!!! Give us ACTION!!! People in the film are fine but we are not there to see them. We have enough drama in our days every day. We want a break from DRAMA!!!
Did you see the movie? It was pretty well balanced
@Blended Circuit because you can’t make an entire movie with just CGI robots and no humans

@bob_1216 The thing is we do not need the life story of theses people. I don't care what personal problems they are having. I want to see action in an action film; not drama. "The Expendables" don't have drama why not hire them to be the humans in the movie. I want to see humans (if there are going to be humans) ready to roll with the action instead of having to know their back story and motivations for what they are doing and why they are the way they are. I don't care. Again I want action and to see just robots slugging it out. I don't care about the human back story. The time it took to give us the back story took away from seeing the robots in action. In most successful action movies there is very little back story. I want guns and bullets flying, people beating the crap out of each other, and explosions in a fricking action movie. John Wick had very little back story. Just enough to know he lost his wife and she left him a dog; that was it. The rest was all action all the way to John Wick 4. If a robber came into a bank to rob the place do you think he would stop to find the hero in the bank and ask him his motivation for being a hero before robbing the bank so everyone in the bank would know what kind of person he was; no. I don't need to know.!
@CassandrasGlossNoir the reason why the humans have their lives Shown is literally so the audience can become attached to them,

MidnightFlicks Comparing transformers films is like comparing a louse to a flea. They're all very derivative of one another - a misunderstood young person going through hard times discovers a car that is actually an alien robot in disguise  hiding on Earth from evil robot aliens.

. The protagonists must find an object and keep it out of the enemies’ hands for as long as possible, and then fight once the enemies seize the object and bring about catastrophe. On the way they learn about the power of friendship and how cool transforming robot cars are.

Transformers : Rise of the Beasts 

The prequel of the Transformers series... Glad to watch the movie on 8th June itself & i am not regretting of watching at the Big screen.

Plot of the Movie

Set in the period of 1994 where Transformers are under refugees on earth waiting for their moment to go to their home Cyberton but their mightiest enemy Unicorn is behind, posing as a threat of their survival

Whether Optimus Prime and his team able to succeed?? Whether Optimus loose his credibility & trust he bestowed upon his team?? Watch it .....

Movie Analysis 

Overall, the movie delivers entertainment. Voice of Optimus Prime always gives goosebumps and positivity..

Action sequences well choreographed especially the climax.

A journey of sacrifice, trust, hope, love had been witnessed.

By the end , we could realise that War is still unfinished.

Overall, a wholesome entertainer
